items.name: The Void's All-Seeing Pink Eye
items.description:
"The void calls to all..."
An eye capable of seeing beyond one's realm into the vast multiverse. This eye radiates a dark energy unlike any other. Originally belonging to a creature of the abyss, you too can have the capability to see beyond this mortal plane! The ones who can see best are the ones who look into everything deeply: even the darkness.
Who needs eyes in the back of their head, when you can simply have one massive, levitating eye floating upon your head looking in all directions instead? Now with an ominous, pink glow!

[ You can find all color variants here!: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=All-Seeing&Category=1&CreatorName=Draconic+Artisans&salesTypeFilter=1]
[ This item is a remaster of an older item created by me: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/15351096705/The-Voids-Eye-Classic ]
